positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mythical forest creature, blending elements of a fox, a wolf, and a majestic owl. The creature is posed in a dynamic, elegant sitting position, surrounded by simplified jungle foliage, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and crystalline geometric patterns. The style is contemporary maximalism meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, using clean, bold linework and flat color blocking with strategic gradients. Focus on strong, high-contrast silhouettes against a slightly distressed parchment background. Composition must be central and balanced, suitable for a large apparel graphic print. Dominant colors are deep forest emerald, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and touches of iridescent gold. Flat graphic design, tattoo style, vector art, concept illustration, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, high contrast, perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, low resolution, blurry, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame, artifacts, grain, bokeh, sketch, grayscale
